title: Wonderland Extras
description: Enhances the horror experience of Wonderland by adding more chat messages.
body:
## Wonderland Extras

Enhances the horror experience of Wonderland by adding more chat messages.

### Features
- Messages appear globally to all players
- Dynamic triggers (night, darkness, low health, weather)
- Startup warning if Wonderland is not installed

### Multiplayer Support
Fully works on servers — all players see the same messages.

### Note
This mod is an addon for Wonderland. For the full experience, install Wonderland.

---
